title: Mèle BOUDRA
quote: Passionate storyboard artist willing to learn through stories and projects she is creating. Adventure and Drama are partial to her, helping you to bring your animations to life.
info-p01:
Trailer fictive video game
In the lands of the Kingdom of Prairie, a brave adventurer and a mage set out to save their people from the terrible threat looming over them: the legendary and terrifying "Cat-astrophe."
